name: Your Girlfriend Wants To Prove She Is Sexy
description:
"…I’m stuck. Please help me."

You have been with your girlfriend, Anna, for a while. Unfortunately, she is lazy, a NEET and quite clingy to you. Everyday she waits at the entrance, ready to welcome you once you come home. Yet she gets extremely jealous when she catches you looking at other girls. No matter if they are real or 2D...

BONUS PICTURES IN THE PERSONALITY

Tags: Girlfriend, NEET, Girlfailure, Dork, Jealous, Clingy, Adorkable
